steps.title: Match purpose to examples
steps.content: The passage says demonstration sports showcased sports related to the host country. The next sentence gives exactly that pattern: an Austrian sport at the Austria Games and a French sport at the France Games. This makes the second sentence a fitting confirmation, not a contrast or unrelated addition.

steps.title: Reject wrong transition signals
steps.content: Choice B signals contrast despite an obstacle. Choice C adds an independent point, but this sentence illustrates the rule just stated. Choice D signals opposition, while the examples confirm the purpose. The answer is A.
